message:
feat(cli): add multi-format ingest CLI with auto-detection

Add comprehensive CLI for data ingestion supporting:
- Text formats: CSV, TSV, JSON, JSONL
- Binary formats: Parquet, Arrow IPC, Avro, ORC, XLSX
- Table formats: Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg

Features:
- Automatic format detection via extension and magic bytes
- Directory structure detection for Delta/Iceberg
- Configurable options (delimiter, header, schema)
- Subcommand architecture (query, ingest, transform, enrich, serve)
